mapper.select: SELECT * FROM like_record WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM like_record WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_record WHERE post_id = #{postId}

SELECT p.*, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM like_record lr INNER JOIN post p ON lr.post_id = p.id INNER JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE lr.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY lr.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
